site.title: Forever In Our Hearts
site.subtitle: A farewell to the ones who made every moment unforgettable

hero.tagline: Not goodbye — just until we meet again

memories.line: Every late night, every shared laugh, every whispered secret —
Now we carry each other forward.
Into the world. Into the unknown.

videos.title: A Farewell to Remember
videos.description: Captured moments and heartfelt goodbyes from our journey together.

videos.title: The Last Walkthrough
videos.description: Revisiting the places and people that made these years special.

videos.title: Batch of 2026
videos.description: Voices, laughter, and memories that will last a lifetime.

quotes.text: The best is yet to come, and won't that be fine.
quotes.author: Frank Sinatra

quotes.text: Don't cry because it's over. Smile because it happened.
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.text: How lucky I am to have something that makes saying goodbye so hard.
quotes.author: A.A. Milne

team.name: Alex Morgan
team.memory: Led us through every storm with grace

team.name: Jordan Lee
team.memory: Always the first to make everyone laugh

team.name: Sam Chen
team.memory: Kept our memories alive through every note
